arts.sum: It is incredibly tight towards the top and bottom of LaLiga and Dan Childs is previewing all 10 games in the Spanish top flight in week 28.

arts.ttl: LaLiga injury news, predicted lineups, fantasy updates
arts.sum: Find out who is missing through injury and who is in a race against time to prove their fitness in Spain's LaLiga this weekend.

Real Valladolid remain bottom of La Liga and face a difficult task of avoiding relegation as they sit 11 points away from safety. With seven losses from their last eight league matches, their chances ...

arts.ttl: Preview: Real Valladolid vs. Celta Vigo - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Real Valladolid and Celta Vigo, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
